meta.title: SK Morocco – Tours & Travel from Marrakech | Desert, Mountains & Coast
meta.description: Discover Morocco with SK Morocco. Book Sahara desert tours, Agafay adventures, Atlas Mountains treks, Essaouira & Ouzoud day trips from Marrakech. Pay on arrival.

hero.subtitle: From Sahara Desert to Atlas Mountains and Atlantic Coast. Desert tours, mountain trips, coastal escapes & cultural experiences.

tours.title: Explore Morocco with Us
tours.subtitle: Multi-day desert adventures, day trips from Marrakech, and unique cultural experiences — all at the best direct price.

sahara.title: 3-Day Sahara Desert Tour
sahara.description: Marrakech → Ait Ben Haddou → Ouarzazate → Merzouga. Camel trek, night in Sahara camp.

agafay.title: Agafay Desert Experience
agafay.description: Quad biking, camel rides, sunset dinner & camp. Just 30 min from Marrakech.

atlas.title: Imlil Day Tour
atlas.description: Guided mountain walk, waterfalls & Berber villages in the Atlas Mountains.

ouzoud.title: Ouzoud Waterfalls Tour
ouzoud.description: Morocco's most spectacular waterfalls — guided tour & free time for photos.

ourika.title: Ourika Valley Tour
ourika.description: Green valley escape — guided tour, waterfall walk & stunning nature.

essaouira.title: Essaouira Day Trip
essaouira.description: Atlantic coastal escape — medina, port & free time by the sea.

licensed.title: Licensed Agency
licensed.desc: Officially licensed Moroccan travel agency with years of proven experience and thousands of satisfied customers.

guides.title: Professional Guides
guides.desc: Experienced local drivers and professional multilingual guides who know Morocco inside and out.

price.title: Best Direct Price
price.desc: Book direct for the best price — no platform commissions. Save 20-30% compared to booking platforms.

support.title: 24/7 WhatsApp Support
support.desc: Instant communication before, during, and after your tour. We're always just a message away.

cancel.title: Free Cancellation
cancel.desc: Plans change — cancel up to 24 hours before for a full refund. No questions asked.

pay.title: Pay on Arrival
pay.desc: No prepayment required. Reserve your spot and pay when the tour starts. Complete peace of mind.

highlight.title: 3-Day Sahara Desert Tour from Marrakech
highlight.description: Experience the ultimate Morocco adventure — from the ancient Kasbah of Ait Ben Haddou through the Todra Gorge to a magical night under the stars in Merzouga Sahara Desert.

booking.title: Ready for Your Morocco Adventure?
booking.subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll confirm your booking within 1 hour on WhatsApp.

items.q: How do I book a tour?
items.a: You can book directly through WhatsApp, our booking form, or by contacting us via email. No deposit required — pay on arrival!
Yes! All our tours include free hotel pickup and drop-off from anywhere in Marrakech.

items.q: What is the difference between Standard and Luxury packages?
items.a: The difference is the category and comfort level of the accommodation. Standard includes standard desert camps or hotels, while Luxury includes premium camps or hotels with enhanced comfort. All other services (transport, camel trek, activities) remain the same.

items.q: Is lunch or dinner included in day tours?
items.a: Day tours (Imlil, Ouzoud, Ourika, Essaouira) are tour-only — lunch and dinner are NOT included. You may purchase meals independently along the route. The Sahara and Agafay tours include meals as specified in each package.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour. Cancel anytime via WhatsApp for a full refund.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash (MAD, EUR, USD, GBP), credit cards, and PayPal. Payment is made on arrival — no prepayment needed.

items.q: Are your tours suitable for children?
items.a: Most tours are family-friendly. The Sahara tour is suitable for ages 4+, and the Agafay quad bikes for ages 16+. Contact us for specific tour details.
Comfortable clothing, sunscreen, sunglasses, a camera, and a warm layer for evenings. We provide everything else including helmets for quad biking.

items.q: Why book directly instead of through platforms?
items.a: Booking direct gives you the best price (no commission fees), direct WhatsApp support, flexible changes, and pay-on-arrival convenience.

footer.ctaSubtitle: Book today and pay on arrival. Free cancellation available.
